results.title: EMCOR’s Dividend Amid Russell Index Exit Could Be A Game Changer For EMCOR Group (EME)
results.description: In recent days, EMCOR Group, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of US$0.40 per common share, payable on July 31, 2026 to stockholders of record as of July 15, 2026, while the company was also removed from multiple Russell indexes effective June 27, 2026. This mix of ongoing cash returns to shareholders alongside broad index removals highlights a tension between EMCOR’s income profile and changing institutional ownership dynamics. We’ll now...

results.description: The 20-year-old has laid down his biggest marker yet and ‘there’s more in the tank for this young fella’.

results.title: Visteon (VC) Stock Looks Undervalued On Cash Flow While Earnings Look Fair
results.description: Visteon stock sits at an interesting point today, with the intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicating a sizeable valuation gap, while broader checks and recent share performance paint a more mixed picture. Over the past 3 years, Visteon shares have declined about 30%, which means longer term holders have not been rewarded despite the recent recovery to around flat over 1 year. The newly announced US$800 million share repurchase authorization can support per...

results.title: Wimbledon 2026 Results: Alexandra Eala Stuns Iga Swiatek, Elena Rybakina Crashes Out In Massive Upsets
results.description: Wimbledon 2026 witnessed major upsets as Alexandra Eala stunned defending champion Iga Swiatek and Elise Mertens knocked out Elena Rybakina. Madison Keys advanced, Serena Williams withdrew from doubles, while Alexander Zverev, Flavio Cobolli, Alex de Minaur and Arthur Fery progressed.

results.title: Encore Capital Group (ECPG) Stock Looks Cheap On Earnings Yet Pricey On Broader Value
results.description: Encore Capital Group stock has rallied strongly over the past year, yet its current valuation checks paint a more mixed picture rather than a clear bargain or clear excess. The share price has delivered a 120.1% return over the past year, which puts extra focus on whether that run is supported by sustainable earnings and cash flows. Growing supply of non performing consumer debt and operational gains from technology can support investor expectations, while higher legal costs, funding...

results.title: Comcast (CMCSA) Faces NFL Network Blackout While NBCUniversal Eyes Video Games
results.description: NFL Network remains blacked out on Comcast as an impasse with content owner Disney continues with the approach of football season. The prolonged absence affects Comcast subscribers who expected NFL programming in upcoming months. Following the announced separation of NBCUniversal and Sky from Comcast’s broadband business, NBCUniversal is reported to be assessing a major push into video games. This potential expansion into gaming would come as NBCUniversal prepares for life as a separately...

results.title: Raphinha could return in Brazil's World Cup last-16 clash with Norway, says Carlo Ancelotti
results.description: Barcelona forward Raphinha, 29, missed Brazil's final group-stage win against Scotland and the last-32 victory against Japan.
